title: October Haarvoor Elected as New Deputy Mayor of Beaufort West
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"BEAUFORT WEST NEWS -  October Haarvoor has been elected as the new Deputy Mayor of Beaufort West following a Special Council meeting held on 3 September.","html":"BEAUFORT WEST NEWS - October Haarvoor has been elected as the new Deputy Mayor of Beaufort West following a Special Council meeting held on 3 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Haarvoor, representing the Democratic Alliance (DA), was elected as Ward 1 Councillor in 2024 and has since been recognised for his dedicated service to the community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He now steps into his new leadership role alongside newly elected Mayor Gina Duimpies.","html":"He now steps into his new leadership role alongside newly elected Mayor Gina Duimpies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Together, the two leaders face the pressing task of stabilising Beaufort West’s municipal administration and restoring public trust in local government.","html":"Together, the two leaders face the pressing task of stabilising Beaufort West’s municipal administration and restoring public trust in local government."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Party officials expressed confidence in Haarvoor’s appointment, noting his reputation for integrity and commitment to service delivery.","html":"Party officials expressed confidence in Haarvoor’s appointment, noting his reputation for integrity and commitment to service delivery."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We believe he will continue to serve the residents of Beaufort West with excellence,” a DA statement read.","html":"“We believe he will continue to serve the residents of Beaufort West with excellence,” a DA statement read."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: October Haarvoor Elected as New Deputy Mayor of Beaufort West
